title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:30-36 create-handler with validation and 201 response

title: GET /books with author filter implemented
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:38-41 list-handler; src/books/db.clj:27-32 list-books supports :author filter

title: GET /books/:id endpoint implemented
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:43-49 get-handler with id parsing and 404 handling

title: PUT /books/:id endpoint implemented
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:51-60 update-handler with validation and 404 handling

title: DELETE /books/:id endpoint implemented
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:62-68 delete-handler returns 204 on success, 404 on missing

title: SQLite database storage implemented
evidence: src/books/db.clj uses next.jdbc with sqlite-jdbc; CREATE TABLE in init! line 10

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:15-22 validate-book checks for nil/empty title and author; returns 400 on validation failure

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:30-88 all endpoints return status codes: 201 create, 200 get/list/update, 204 delete, 404 not found, 400 validation error

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:13-29 documents Stack, Setup, Run, Test, and Endpoints

title: Tests (at least 3 required)
evidence: test/books/handler_test.clj contains 8 tests: health-check, create-and-get-book, missing-title-is-400, missing-author-is-400, list-with-author-filter, update-book, delete-book, get-missing-returns-404
